tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service
payload.description: Planning for long-term Select Bus Service along the Woodhaven/Cross Bay Blvd corridor, including a community input process with Community Advisory Committee, public workshops, and meetings with Community Boards and stakeholders.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service

payload.description: Corridor studied for Select Bus Service implementation, described as one of the most dangerous corridors in the city for drivers and pedestrians.

tool_args.label: Q52
tool_args.raw_text: The limited-stop route (Q52 and/or Q53) would be replaced by Select Bus Service

payload.description: Limited-stop bus route along Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor that would be replaced by Select Bus Service.

tool_args.label: Q53
tool_args.raw_text: The limited-stop route (Q52 and/or Q53) would be replaced by Select Bus Service

payload.description: Limited-stop bus route along Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor that would be replaced by Select Bus Service; provides service north of Queens Boulevard to Woodside.

tool_args.raw_text: Q53, Q52, Q11, Q21 signal priority will make bus service better

tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard SBS Public Workshop I
tool_args.raw_text: The first Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service public workshop took place on April 23, 2014. 92 participants attended

payload.description: First Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevard Select Bus Service public workshop with 92 participants. Included SBS presentation, mapping/small group discussion, and worldwide BRT examples.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven SBS Design Charrette
tool_args.raw_text: This 'design charrette' will take place on Wednesday, June 25, 2014 from 7:00 – 9:00 PM

payload.description: Design charrette to gather community input on integration and design of Select Bus Service along the corridor and begin planning stop locations.

tool_args.label: Implementation of short-term recommendations begins
tool_args.raw_text: Implementation of the short-term recommendations will begin in the fall of 2014

payload.description: Implementation of short-term recommendations begins, including offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues and curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues
tool_args.raw_text: offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues (reducing congestion by eliminating the need for general traffic to merge onto to the overpass)

payload.description: Offset bus lanes reducing congestion by eliminating the need for general traffic to merge onto the overpass.

tool_args.label: Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard
tool_args.raw_text: curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard (allowing buses to reach subway connections faster without removing travel lanes)

payload.description: Curbside bus lanes allowing buses to reach subway connections faster without removing travel lanes.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors
tool_args.raw_text: The study found that Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors in the city for drivers and pedestrians

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors in the city for drivers and pedestrians
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Q52 should be extended further into Far Rockaway

payload.claim_text: The Q52 should be extended further into Far Rockaway
payload.subject: Q52 service

tool_args.label: Limited-stop replaced by SBS
tool_args.raw_text: The limited-stop route (Q52 and/or Q53) would be replaced by Select Bus Service, similar to how Select Bus Service has been implemented on other bus routes in New York City.

payload.claim_text: The limited-stop route (Q52 and/or Q53) would be replaced by Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: SBS fare is $2.50
tool_args.raw_text: The base cost of riding a Select Bus Service bus is $2.50, the same as riding the subway or the local or limited-stop bus.

payload.claim_text: The base cost of riding a Select Bus Service bus is $2.50, the same as riding the subway or the local or limited-stop bus.
payload.subject: SBS fare

tool_args.label: Side medians force buses to use service roads
tool_args.raw_text: side medians force buses to use the service roads and lead to slow bus service

payload.claim_text: Side medians force buses to use the service roads and lead to slow bus service
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: SBS enables more service through faster buses
tool_args.raw_text: Our experience with other Select Bus Service routes has been that because the buses travel faster, the MTA is able to provide more service and more reliable service.

payload.claim_text: Because the buses travel faster, the MTA is able to provide more service and more reliable service.
payload.subject: Select Bus Service

Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard as short-term recommendation
